title: Shared enum vocabulary
description: Stable enum vocabulary referenced by multiple schemas. Only enums backed by Go consts with a finite set live here; open-set strings stay as plain string. Consumers MUST tolerate unknown enum members (additive-compat) — adding a member is not a capabilities bump.

HarnessSource.description: Where a harness was installed from. Drives provenance reporting and update behaviour.

UpdateState.description: Update status of an installed harness against its upstream.

ErrorCategory.description: Coarse classification of an error for routing/retry decisions. Consumers map this to their own error model (e.g. MCP error codes).

ErrorCode.description: Stable error code identifier. Closed enum — adding a new code is a schema PR. Tightening enforcement that a code never changes meaning once shipped.
